(6) DRAMATIS PERSONAE AND TERMS OF ART ABBREVIATIONS

23. In this statement, I will refer to various people involved in the case and some of the language used. I thought it would assist the Inquiry if I put that all in one place for ease of reference. The core of this document is the actual dramatis personae we used in the trial, but I have added to it for completeness:

Alan Brown Sub postmaster of Grangemouth sub post office, Falkirk, Scotland.

Alexander Goold Counsel for Mr Castleton

Andrew Dunks Fujitsu Services IT Security Analyst. Witness.

Andrew Wise POL employee responsible for training new sub-postmasters. Witness.

Anne Chambers Fujitsu Services system specialist. Witness.

Brian Pinder An employee of Fujitsu with the job title of Security Manager, PO Account. He became the main person with whom we liaised when we had queries which we needed Fujitsu to answer. He would ask who he thought the appropriate person was at Fujitsu to answer them and let us know. He performed a relationship/co-ordinator type role.

Page 11 of 194
